text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But the audience only talks about two<n>particular
Umamusume who have<n>continued to shine after
their debut.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The buzz is all about Winning Ticket<n>and Biwa
Hayahide, and which of<n>them will win the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin steps up to the<n>racecourse to show
the world her<n>true abilities and make her presence
known.
